helper_landscape_summary: Landscape mixes 2025 attention-kernel work (PAT prefix-aware multi-tile, TyphoonMLA mixed naive-absorb) and orthogonal items (preplan-anchor RL, Causal-LLM, classical Wiener-Hopf). No retrieved paper fuses Wiener-Hopf factorization with causal attention; closest functional neighbors are prefix/shared-segment optimizations rather than operator-theoretic splits.

hints.hint_text: Verify whether any 2024-2026 paper explicitly applies Wiener-Hopf factorization to causal self-attention or to softmax/linear-attention kernels.
Decompose candidate into sub-mechanisms; check independent prior art for Toeplitz/structured-matrix attention (e.g., TNN, RetNet decay).
Assess composition novelty: factorization-based causal split for KV-cache or prefill/decode separation may be anticipated by chunked-prefill, SplitFuse/Sarathi, DistServe.
Map candidate against operator-splitting/Riemann-Hilbert literature; search 'spectral factorization attention'.
Time-lag risk: applied-math-to-DL transfer often lags 12-24 months; check arXiv Q1 2026 for concurrent submissions.
Cross-check whether 'causal' in candidate refers to causal-mask kernel vs. causal-inference; disambiguate against Causal-LLM.

solver_traces.reasoning: Classical Wiener-Hopf in PMC8526176 covers operator-theoretic split but is not applied to attention. PAT optimizes prefix-aware tiling without symbol factorization. No 2024-2026 attention paper explicitly invokes Wiener-Hopf factorization on the attention kernel symbol.

solver_traces.search_query: Toeplitz Neural Network TNN RetNet structured causal attention 2023 2024
solver_traces.reasoning: TNN parameterizes a Toeplitz operator which is the discrete analog of the half-line convolution kernel — adjacent to but not identical to Wiener-Hopf factorization. RetNet uses exponential decay weights as a causal-recurrent factorization, also adjacent.

solver_traces.search_query: chunked prefill SplitFuse Sarathi prefill decode disaggregation 2024
solver_traces.reasoning: Systems-level prefill/decode separation is heavily published (Sarathi, DistServe, SplitFuse, vLLM scheduling). However the structural primitive there is request-level scheduling, not operator-symbol factorization — orthogonal mechanism.
No paper located that operationalizes Riemann-Hilbert / spectral factorization on attention kernels. Spectral attention work targets Fourier/wavelet basis, not multiplicative symbol factorization.
Q1 2026 arXiv shows no Wiener-Hopf attention preprint indexed via standard search. Time-lag risk remains nonzero but undocumented.

solver_traces.search_query: causal mask attention vs causal inference disambiguation LLM 2025
solver_traces.reasoning: Causal-LLM paper #3 in landscape is causal-inference, not causal-attention. Candidate is causal-attention, so no overlap; disambiguation rules out false-positive match.

tree_stream_rationale: No hint returned 'anticipated' BUT H2 (per_hint_similarity 0.55, TNN/RetNet adjacent), H3 (0.45 systems-level prefill/decode), and H5 (0.30 time-lag) flag elevated similarity. Synthesizer notes that the v8 FAIL polarity is driven by step 10 mechanical FAIL (5 keyword hits across PAT/TyphoonMLA/Wiener-Hopf-classical/Causal-LLM/Preplan-anchor). Tree-stream verdict aligns FAIL with step 10 — though for a different reason: tree-stream sees TNN/RetNet adjacency that step 10 keyword rule did not weight.
